services.title: what we do
services.intro: a website gets you online. we add ai that answers questions, reads your documents, predicts what's next, and handles repetitive work.

items.body: fast, multilingual websites, built to last.

items.name: chatbots & llm integration

items.name: document assistants
items.body: ask questions about your contracts, manuals, and reports. every answer links to its source.

items.name: ml & predictive analytics

items.name: ai automation
items.body: we connect your tools and automate the repetitive tasks between them.

privacy.title: privacy policy

meta.title: privacy policy
meta.description: what personal data we collect, why, and your rights under the GDPR.

privacy.intro: This policy explains what personal data kaolin.studio collects, why, and what rights you have under the GDPR (in the Netherlands, the AVG). We keep data collection to the minimum this site actually needs.

p: Kaolin is a two-person studio (Amsterdam and Chișinău) and is the data controller for this website. You can reach us at hello@kaolin.studio.
Our Chamber of Commerce (KVK) number and registered address will be added here once the studio is formally registered.
Contact form: when you write to us, we receive the name, email address, and message you submit. These are delivered through our forms provider, Formspree.
AI assistant: the messages you type into the on-page assistant are sent to our AI provider to generate a reply. Please don't enter sensitive personal data. It's a demo, not a secure channel.
Automatic data: to keep the assistant from being abused, your IP address is used briefly to enforce rate limits. We also use privacy-friendly, aggregated analytics that don't build a profile of you.

We handle your contact details to respond to your enquiry and to take steps at your request before any agreement. That is our legitimate interest and, where relevant, pre-contractual necessity (Art. 6(1)(b) and (f) GDPR).
Rate-limiting and basic security rest on our legitimate interest in protecting the site (Art. 6(1)(f)). Aggregated analytics rest on the same basis and set no tracking cookies.

We rely on a few carefully chosen processors: Formspree (contact-form delivery), Vercel (hosting and cookieless analytics), Upstash (temporary rate-limit counters), and Groq (AI model inference for the assistant).

Some of these providers are based outside the European Economic Area. Where that is the case, transfers are covered by appropriate safeguards such as the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses.

We keep contact messages only as long as needed to handle your request and any follow-up, then delete them. Assistant conversations are not stored by us for the long term, and rate-limit data expires automatically within a day.

Under the GDPR/AVG you can ask us to access, correct, delete, or restrict your data, object to processing, or receive it in a portable form. To exercise any of these, email hello@kaolin.studio and we will respond within the legal time limit.
You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens) if you are unhappy with how we handle your data.
This site is aimed at businesses and is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect their data.
We may update this policy as the studio grows or the law changes. The date at the top shows the current version.

terms.title: terms of use

meta.title: terms of use
meta.description: the rules for using the kaolin.studio website and its ai demo.

terms.intro: These terms govern your use of kaolin.studio. By using the site you accept them. This is our marketing website; any actual project work is covered by a separate written agreement.

p: kaolin.studio is an informational website for Kaolin, a father and son AI-implementation studio. Nothing here is a binding offer; the scope, price, and terms of any project are agreed separately, in writing.

The on-page assistant is a live demo powered by a third-party language model. Its answers are generated automatically and can be incomplete or wrong. Treat them as illustrative, not as professional, legal, financial, or technical advice.
Please don't submit confidential or sensitive personal information through the assistant, and don't rely on it for decisions without confirming with us directly.

The text, design, and code of this site belong to Kaolin unless stated otherwise. You may view it and share links to it, but not copy or reuse its content for your own commercial purposes without permission.
The site is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind. We work to keep it accurate and available, but we can't guarantee it will always be error-free or uninterrupted.

To the extent permitted by law, Kaolin is not liable for any indirect or consequential loss arising from your use of this site or reliance on the assistant. Nothing in these terms limits liability that cannot be limited under Dutch law.
Where we link to other sites, including the demos we've built, we are not responsible for their content or their own privacy practices.
These terms are governed by Dutch law. Any disputes fall under the jurisdiction of the competent court in the Netherlands.
Questions about these terms? Email hello@kaolin.studio. Our KVK number and registered address will be added here once the studio is formally registered.

cookies.title: cookies & ai transparency

meta.title: cookies & ai transparency
meta.description: what we store, and how the ai assistant on the site works.

cookies.intro: We try to run this site with as little tracking as possible. This page explains the few bits of storage we use and, just as importantly, how the AI assistant works.

p: We don't use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies, and we don't sell data. The site works without you having to accept a wall of trackers.

A functional preference: when you choose a language, that choice may be remembered (via a NEXT_LOCALE cookie) so the site opens in the right language next time. It is strictly functional and holds no personal profile.
Analytics: we use Vercel's privacy-friendly analytics, which measure page views in aggregate, without cookies and without identifying individual visitors.
You can clear or block cookies at any time in your browser settings. Blocking the language cookie only means the site won't remember your language preference between visits.

The assistant is powered by a third-party large language model (served by Groq). When you send it a message, that message is transmitted to the provider to generate a reply, then streamed back to your screen.
Like all such models, it can "hallucinate", stating something confidently that is inaccurate. It is a demonstration of what we build, not an authoritative source.

It does not give professional, medical, legal, or financial advice, and it can't make commitments on our behalf. For anything that matters, a real person at Kaolin will confirm it. You can always reach us at hello@kaolin.studio.
Only send information you're comfortable sharing. We don't use your conversations to train models, and we don't store them long-term. See our privacy policy for the full picture.

footer.tagline: websites with ai, built by two people.
